steps.title: Translate the percentage statement to an equation
steps.content:
The phrase 350 percent of n is 35 translates to:
$$3.5n = 35$$
(since 350% = 3.5)

steps.title: Solve for n by dividing both sides by 3.5
Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches choice D, $10$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore D is correct.
